
::: {layout-nw="[[1,1], [1,1]]"}

[![] (https://github-readme-stats.vercel.app/api/pin/?username=pamacado&repo=options-pricing&theme=radical)](https://github.com/pamacado/options-pricing)

[![] (https://github-readme-stats.vercel.app/api/pin/?username=pamacado&repo=pdp-rl&theme=radical)](https://github.com/pamacado/pdp-rl)


:::
